texto: Every event in life — the rejections, the relationships, all the embarrassing things you do will lead you to the person you are destined to be with. You may want to change certain things about your past, but everything has been just another chapter in your book of life. If you don’t believe me, buy a book — any book — and rip out an entire chapter — any chapter — and read it. Now, get a full copy of the same book and read it again. Odds are you’ll find that chapter pieced everything together the way it was supposed to be.
explicacao: Citação de Mike Zacchio sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Every event in life — the rejections, the relationships, all the embarrassing things you do will …” articula reflexao, books, chapters em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e chapters.
